calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association . Inc.'s 1. Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery granted.
a. All objections to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One], and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One]-except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges-are waived;
b. Judgment Debtor shall provide full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 20 days of the date of this Order;

2. Request for sanctions granted in the sum of $300.00. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT
